# EOSE Investor Dashboard — robots.txt
# https://spotswoods.github.io/eose-dashboard/

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Don't crawl the legacy single-file fallback (duplicates main page content)
Disallow: /index-legacy.html

# Don't crawl the auto-generated quote JSON or workflow internals
Disallow: /data/
Disallow: /.github/

# Be friendly to LLM crawlers / answer engines too
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://spotswoods.github.io/eose-dashboard/sitemap.xml
